answer:
The model scale is 1:20, so the length scale ratio is \( L_r = 20 \). For gravity-dominated flow (Froude similarity), the head ratio equals the length ratio, so the model head is \( h_m = 20 / 20 = 1 \) meter. Discharge scales as \( Q_r = L_r^{5/2} = 20^{2.5} \approx 1788.85 \), so prototype discharge is \( Q_p = 0.5 \times 1788.85 \approx 894 \, \text{m}^3/\text{s} \).  

\boxed{E}
